option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="8dp">
<androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/cardMessage" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="1dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvMessage" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:padding="12dp" android:textColor="@color/text_main" android:textSize="14sp" /> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<com.google.android.material.chip.ChipGroup android:id="@+id/chipGroupSuggestions" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:visibility="gone" app:chipSpacing="4dp" app:singleLine="false" />
</LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="8dp">
<androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/cardMessage" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="1dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvMessage" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:maxLines="3" android:padding="12dp" android:textColor="@color/text_main" android:textSize="14sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvShowMore" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="12dp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:text="Show More" android:textColor="@color/primary" android:textSize="12sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:visibility="gone" />
</LinearLayout> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<!-- Action Toolbar for AI Messages --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/layoutActionToolbar" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:orientation="horizontal" android:visibility="gone">
<TextView android:id="@+id/btnCopy" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="?android:attr/selectableItemBackground" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:padding="8dp" android:text="Copy" android:textColor="@color/primary" android:textSize="12sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/btnRegenerate" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:background="?android:attr/selectableItemBackground" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:padding="8dp" android:text="Regenerate" android:textColor="@color/primary" android:textSize="12sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/btnHelpful" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:background="?android:attr/selectableItemBackground" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:padding="8dp" android:text="Helpful" android:textColor="@color/primary" android:textSize="12sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/btnNotHelpful" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:background="?android:attr/selectableItemBackground" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:padding="8dp" android:text="Not Helpful" android:textColor="@color/primary" android:textSize="12sp" />
</LinearLayout>
<com.google.android.material.chip.ChipGroup android:id="@+id/chipGroupSuggestions" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:visibility="gone" app:chipSpacing="4dp" app:singleLine="false" />
</LinearLayout>
